hero.title: Backend and AI systems engineer turning production constraints into clean delivery.

about.summary: Production-minded engineering with infrastructure awareness, system design discipline, and practical AI execution.
about.text:
I build backend and AI systems with a strong production mindset, focusing on **reliability, clarity, and measurable outcomes**.

In my current work, I lead and structure **agentic AI development processes**, using **spec-driven development** to align requirements, implementation, and validation. I also design reusable internal tooling for **Claude Code usage**, create shared AI **skills and workflows**, and mentor engineers on practical AI delivery patterns.

I am building a production-oriented **AI Agent for bill parsing** and integrating **AI-assisted code review** into CI/CD with human validation gates. My goal is to improve engineering speed and quality without sacrificing ownership or standards.

I also operate in DevOps-related domains, including **Kubernetes**, **Azure DevOps**, and **Google Cloud**, connecting application delivery with infrastructure reliability.

Core stack: **.NET / C#**, **PostgreSQL and SQL Server**, **Azure and Google Cloud**, CI/CD automation, and AI API integrations (including personal projects with Gemini image transformation).

experiences.description:
Shipped invoice collection and telemetry services exposing 11k+ invoices/month through Azure API Management.
- Owned PRs, code reviews, QA, and deployment for release-ready delivery.
- Applied DDD, Clean Architecture, and SOLID in production APIs and telemetry enrichment.

Built APIs, databases, and support services for product and out-of-roadmap requests.
- Turned ad hoc work into stable delivery with clear handoffs.
- Kept internal teams unblocked while the roadmap kept moving.

Built React and AngularJS features for a marketing automation SaaS platform.
- Implemented contact segmentation and automation flows with Python and Flask.
- Contributed across frontend, API, and data layers.

Supported high-security telephony systems using UNIX and PostgreSQL.
- Automated repetitive operations with shell scripts.
- Translated complex incidents for non-technical clients and minimized downtime.

projectsList.title: ProvaAI Systems & Infrastructure
projectsList.description: Designed the cloud and Kubernetes backbone for ProvaAI, separating environments, hardening secrets, introducing Argo CD GitOps, and consolidating observability for a leaner production path.

projectsList.title: Claude Code AI Enablement
projectsList.description: Led team AI enablement by maintaining shared Claude Code skills, plugins, and workflows that made agent-assisted delivery faster, safer, and easier to standardize.

caseStudy.context: The team needed a repeatable way to use AI coding agents without every engineer reinventing prompts, workflows, or safety checks from scratch.
caseStudy.ownership: I structured and maintained shared Claude Code skills, plugins, and operating workflows, then turned them into practical patterns other engineers could reuse day to day.
caseStudy.constraints: The work had to improve delivery speed without creating prompt sprawl, inconsistent usage, or lower engineering standards across the team.
caseStudy.outcome: The result was a more standardized AI-assisted delivery flow that made experimentation safer, onboarding easier, and agent usage more reusable across the team.

projectsList.title: AI Bill Extraction Platform
projectsList.description: Shaped the architecture for an energy-bill extraction platform that combines PDF parsing, RAG retrieval, provider-aware rules, and deterministic validation before persisting verified bills into the core service.

caseStudy.context: The platform had to extract structured energy-bill data from provider PDFs while handling document variation, retrieval context, and validation before anything reached the core service.
caseStudy.ownership: I defined the architecture around PDF parsing, retrieval-assisted extraction, provider-specific rules, and deterministic validation so the system could balance automation with reliability.
caseStudy.constraints: The main challenge was reducing LLM ambiguity and provider variability while keeping the pipeline trustworthy enough for production persistence.
caseStudy.outcome: The design created a cleaner path for verified bill ingestion, with explicit validation stages and clearer separation between AI-assisted extraction and business-safe persistence.

projectsList.title: Federated GraphQL with HotChocolate & Fusion
projectsList.description: Defined federated GraphQL boundaries with HotChocolate and Fusion so multiple domains could ship independently behind a cleaner, unified API surface.

caseStudy.context: Multiple backend domains needed to evolve independently without exposing fragmented API boundaries to consumers.
caseStudy.ownership: I helped define the federated GraphQL boundaries and integration approach so domain teams could keep autonomy while contributing to one coherent API surface.
caseStudy.constraints: The solution had to reduce consumer complexity without coupling teams too tightly or turning the federated layer into a bottleneck.
caseStudy.outcome: The resulting shape supported a cleaner unified API experience while preserving clearer ownership lines across backend domains.

projectsList.title: Observability with SigNoz & OpenTelemetry
projectsList.description: Implemented OpenTelemetry-based observability patterns with SigNoz to improve traces, logs, and production diagnostics across distributed services.

caseStudy.context: Distributed services were generating operational complexity that required better traceability across requests, logs, and production incidents.
caseStudy.ownership: I implemented the observability direction around OpenTelemetry instrumentation and SigNoz-based diagnostics patterns for production troubleshooting.
caseStudy.constraints: The instrumentation needed to be useful enough for real incident diagnosis without creating noisy telemetry or unclear ownership of signals.
caseStudy.outcome: This improved the team’s ability to diagnose production behavior with better trace correlation and a more coherent observability baseline across services.

certificationsSummary: Relevant certifications that reinforce applied cloud and AI learning, while experience and shipped work remain the main proof.
